goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'london kings cross' and should 'leave after 13:45'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
